title: rosa × dumetorum subvar. cinerosa
intro: Rosa × dumetorum subvar. cinerosa, also known as cinerous rose or wild rose, is a subvariety of the Rosa × dumetorum plant, a hybrid rose species. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, primarily due to its high concentration of flavonoids and phenolic acids, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Rosa × dumetorum subvar. cinerosa include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can help to reduce stress and promote overall well-being. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to take advantage of its medicinal properties, although more research is needed to confirm its full potential.
